entities.name: Esprima
entities.context: A JavaScript parser that is compatible with the module.

entities.name: abstract syntax tree
entities.context: A type hierarchy used for representing the structure of source code.

entities.name: Mozilla Parser API

relationships.context: Esprima is an implementation of the abstract syntax tree type hierarchy.
The Mozilla Parser API is referenced as the pioneer of the type hierarchy.
